name: Session Deletion UI
summary: Context menu UI for deleting agent sessions from the sidebar
goals: Provide a right-click context menu option for session deletion

specDetail.description: An AgentContextMenu component that provides a right-click context menu on session items in the sidebar. Includes a 'Delete Session' option that triggers a confirmation dialog.

parameters.name: sessionId
parameters.description: ID of the session to delete

parameters.name: onDelete
parameters.description: Callback invoked after deletion is confirmed

constraints: Must prevent deletion of the last remaining session
Must auto-select another session after deletion

acceptanceCriteria.given: a session exists in the sidebar
acceptanceCriteria.when: the user right-clicks and confirms deletion
acceptanceCriteria.then: the session is removed from the sidebar and another session becomes active

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: docs(sync-specs): implement leaf determination redesign with frontend/backend criteria
